'''languwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reachback|reachback]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reachback|reachback]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| languwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:længiwith|længiwith]] || [[word:længiwij|længiwij]] || [[word:længiwish|længiwish]] || [[word:længiwi|længiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:langunguwuth|langunguwuth]] || [[word:langunguwuj|langunguwuj]] || [[word:langunguwush|langunguwush]] || [[word:langunguwu|langunguwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:languwuth|languwuth]] || [[word:languwuj|languwuj]] || [[word:languwush|languwush]] || [[word:languwu|languwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:langufwuth|langufwuth]] || [[word:langufwuj|langufwuj]] || [[word:langufwush|langufwush]] || [[word:langufwuf|langufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:languwuthu|languwuthu]] || [[word:languwuju|languwuju]] || [[word:languwushu|languwushu]] || [[word:languwuku|languwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:languwuth|languwuth]] || [[word:languwuj|languwuj]] || [[word:languwush|languwush]] || [[word:languwu|languwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:languwuthul|languwuthul]] || [[word:languwujul|languwujul]] || [[word:languwushul|languwushul]] || [[word:languwukul|languwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:languwuthuthu|languwuthuthu]] || [[word:languwujuju|languwujuju]] || [[word:languwushushu|languwushushu]] || [[word:languwuku|languwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:languwuthun|languwuthun]] || [[word:languwujun|languwujun]] || [[word:languwushun|languwushun]] || [[word:languwukun|languwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:languwuthuoro|languwuthuoro]] || [[word:languwujuoro|languwujuoro]] || [[word:languwushuoro|languwushuoro]] || [[word:languwukuoro|languwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
